articles.title: AI AND SAAS MONETIZATION: LEARN STRATEGIES FROM A16Z
articles.summary: In this live webinar with Metronome [4], Martin Casado, General Partner at Andreessen Horowitz, will share how both startups and public companies are adapting for the AI era by shifting from subscriptions [4] to results-based, hybrid monetization.

articles.title: REGISTER FOR THE LIVE SESSION ON NOVEMBER 4
WHY TECH NEEDS PERSONALIZATION
articles.summary: Modern mapping and AI systems prioritize efficiency over empathy, erasing human nuance and routine. True progress lies in personalization - technology that recognizes patterns, preferences, and the emotional texture of daily life.

articles.title: STILL STANDING: THE NINE LIVES OF A PRODUCT MANAGER
articles.summary: Resilient product managers grow through crises - failed launches, outages, strategy shifts, or burnout. Survival comes from adaptability, empathy, and continuous learning that turn setbacks into stronger leadership.

articles.title: WHY AI CANNOT SIMULATE YOUR CUSTOMERS' BEHAVIOUR
articles.summary: LLMs can mimic human survey responses but not real behavior, making their insights unreliable for strategy. True differentiation still comes from real customer conversations, not simulated intent or synthetic data.

articles.title: WHAT VMWARE'S FORMER CEO SAYS YOU SHOULD PRIORITIZE AFTER PRODUCT-MARKET FIT
articles.summary: Sustained company growth depends on codified culture, adaptable operating frameworks, and repeatable go-to-market systems. Clear values, scalable structures, and disciplined execution turn early success into lasting impact.

articles.title: TURN IDEAS INTO PRODUCTS WITH VIBE SOLUTIONING
articles.summary: Don't settle for a half baked prototype. Use Rocket [9] to turn your product vision (or Figma designs) into full-stack apps with UI, backend logic and AI workflows. Iterate, maintain, and integrate new features without wasting dev cycles. +400K users are already vibe

articles.title: MARKETING ATTRIBUTION IS A LIE
articles.summary: Marketers have mistaken dashboards for understanding, killing creativity in the name of “data-driven” decisions. Real growth comes from balancing analytics with intuition - using attribution tools for optimization, not strategy - and investing again in brand, demand creation, and human insight.

articles.title: HOW TO GET FASTER APPROVAL FROM YOUR MANAGER
articles.summary: Managers approve slowly because they own the consequences. Make it easy to say yes - anticipate questions, flag risks, and clearly state what you need.

articles.title: BE THE NAVY, NOT PIRATES
articles.summary: Great organizations evolve from daring pirates into disciplined navies. Lasting success demands structure, doctrine, and courage - turning individual boldness into collective power that endures beyond the founder.

articles.title: THIS IS HOW TO FIND MEANING IN LIFE: 4 SECRETS FROM PHILOSOPHY
articles.summary: When life feels meaningless, Camus invites us to confront that emptiness head-on. Meaning isn't discovered, but created through responsibility, empathy, and passionate living in the face of The Absurd.

articles.title: YOUR 15 YEARS EXPERIENCE ISN'T THE PROBLEM. WHERE YOU'RE LOOKING IS.
articles.summary: Experience isn't the problem - it's misalignment.

articles.title: PUSHING BACK ON IMPOSSIBLE SCOPE
articles.summary: When overloaded, don't work harder - clarify tradeoffs.
